response.title: Mid-level Corporate Lawyer
response.description: Smith & Johnson LLP is seeking a Mid-level Corporate Lawyer to join our dynamic legal team. The successful candidate will have experience in corporate law and will work closely with clients on a variety of corporate matters, including mergers and acquisitions, contract negotiations, and compliance issues. This is an excellent opportunity for a motivated individual looking to further their career in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

requirements.education: Juris Doctor (JD) from an accredited law school
